description: 12 historical scope-creep scenarios. Volume is intentional: agents calibrate on edge cases, not one hero example.

examples.request: Change one word on approved flyer proof
examples.why: Under 15 minutes, scope locked, goodwill once.
examples.operator_lens: Log courtesy_used so next tweak is fee.

examples.request: Add second brand color not in original brief
examples.why: Medium visual change mid-job. Change order before pixels move.
examples.operator_lens: New client: firm boundary sets tone for whole relationship.

examples.request: Cousin wants 4 more pages on family reunion book
examples.why: Family still gets named price or honest trade.

examples.request: Scrap layout, start over with new style mid-project
examples.why: Large spec change. Pause and re-quote.
examples.operator_lens: Repeat client respects pause if you explain calendar impact.

examples.request: Now optimize the site you delivered last month
examples.why: Closed job. New intake and quote.

examples.request: Can you also handle printing while we talk at the counter?
examples.why: No written scope. Freeze before more labor.
examples.operator_lens: Intake should have caught this; freeze now.

examples.request: Add rush delivery on already-discounted job
examples.why: Thin margin cannot absorb medium rush. Fee or original scope only.
examples.operator_lens: fee_rush_or_decline also plausible; thin margin rule wins at 97.

examples.request: Extra banner by tomorrow, original was business cards only
examples.why: Hard date plus new deliverable. Rush fee or later date.
examples.operator_lens: Healthy margin still needs calendar honesty.

examples.request: Designer asks to add animations while client did not ask
examples.why: Internal gold-plating. Ship v1, quote phase 2 to client.
examples.operator_lens: Protect margin and deadline from internal creep.

examples.request: Tweak delivered PDF they lost on their end
examples.why: Delivered + medium = new job line, even for VIP.
examples.operator_lens: VIP gets fast quote, not free rework.

examples.request: Add online booking after we agreed on static site only
examples.why: Large add-on mid-build. Re-quote before build.
examples.operator_lens: defer_phase_two is wrong for large; requote wins.

examples.request: Maybe add stickers to the order, not sure yet
examples.why: Tiny exploratory ask on quoted job: clarify or courtesy if truly tiny.
examples.operator_lens: If stickers become full second SKU, re-run as medium.
